claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Rely on IAEA source language for incident classification.
Do not infer radiological impact beyond source statements.
Cross-reference major incidents with official national regulators where available.
name: IAEA IEC
purpose: Dry-run International Atomic Energy Agency incident and emergency metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Flag reporting lag and member-state reporting completeness limits.
Separate confirmed cases from alerts and suspected cases.
Do not infer individual or local health risk from regional bulletins.
name: Africa CDC
purpose: Dry-run Africa CDC outbreak and public-health bulletin metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve English, Spanish, or Portuguese source-language provenance.
Separate epidemiological observations from modeled transmission claims.
Track publication date and covered reporting period separately.
name: PAHO
purpose: Dry-run Pan American Health Organization epidemiological alert metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Separate immediate disaster observations from early damage estimates.
Preserve regional and country source attribution.
Cross-reference geophysical events with USGS, JMA, or BMKG where possible.
name: AHA Centre
purpose: Dry-run ASEAN disaster and humanitarian incident metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve Indonesian and English source fields where available.
Treat early earthquake and tsunami notices as time-sensitive but revisable.
Do not infer damage or casualty impact from hazard telemetry alone.
name: BMKG Indonesia
purpose: Dry-run Indonesian earthquake, tsunami, weather, and geophysical metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Separate environmental observations from health-risk interpretation.
Preserve agency confidence or advisory language.
Do not generalize Singapore-specific readings to the wider region without corroboration.
name: Singapore NEA
purpose: Dry-run Singapore environmental, haze, dengue, and weather metadata capture.

claim_boundary: Dry-run metadata only; no live ingestion, validation, alerting, or production readiness claimed.
guardrails: Preserve Spanish source-language fields and translated fields separately.
Track indicator methodology and reporting period.
Do not treat statistical updates as real-time economic events.
name: INEGI
purpose: Dry-run Mexico national statistics and economic indicator metadata capture.
